Initializer# init(type:buffer:)

iOS 5.0+iPadOS 5.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.14+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(
    type: OM_uint32,
    buffer: gss_buffer_desc
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/GSS/gss_iov_buffer_desc_struct/init(type:buffer:)#parameters)

`type`The desired IOV buffer type.

`buffer`The buffer structure.

## [Discussion](/documentation/GSS/gss_iov_buffer_desc_struct/init(type:buffer:)#Discussion)

Initialize a new IOV buffer structure with the given configuration.
